summary: First end-to-end test run for Chaioz MVP (Phase 1 website). All 20 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend critical flows verified: Landing hero, Menu browsing (71 items across 6 categories), Add-to-cart with customize dialog, cart drawer, guest checkout with Square mock payment, order confirmation with short_code, admin login redirect, admin stats dashboard + 14d revenue chart + orders table.

issues: Custom Brioche display font fails to load due to CORS on customer-assets.emergentagent.com (Access-Control-Allow-Origin missing). Hero/headings fall back to system serif. Asset host issue, not app bug — consider re-hosting font locally under /public/fonts or adding @font-face with a permissive-CORS source.

action_items: (Minor) Self-host Brioche .otf under /app/frontend/public/fonts and update @font-face src to avoid CORS failures on custom-assets CDN.
(Optional) Admin Today's Revenue shows $34.65 generated by test orders — not a bug, expected from fixture orders.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 47-50: seed_admin correctly re-hashes admin password if it has changed — good idempotency.
auth_utils.py cookie settings: SameSite=None + Secure + HttpOnly are correct for cross-site preview domain and match frontend withCredentials.
routers/orders.py awards int(total*10) points — for total=$4.95 awards 49 pts (acceptable). Consider round() instead of int() for fractional cents correctness; minor.
routers/admin.py stats: repeat_rate uses unique_users as divisor but sets to 1 when zero — division-safe. Good.
models.py OrderLineItem uses `price` and `qty` (not `unit_price`/`quantity`) — frontend CartContext/Checkout.jsx aligns. Consistent.
menu.py get_item does not return 404 when item missing — returns null. Minor API hygiene improvement.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@chaioz.com.au / Chaioz@2026 (works). New test users registered dynamically with TEST_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Auto-seeded by backend lifespan: 1 admin, 71 menu items, 8 retail products. Test orders created during run (guest + TEST_ user).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend healthy at https://late-night-chai-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/. OrderLineItem schema uses price/qty (NOT unit_price/quantity). Pydantic v2 models. Auth uses HttpOnly cookie `access_token` with SameSite=None+Secure; for pytest use requests.Session — cookies persist automatically. Frontend places Karak Classic size=Regular+$0 delta by default. Admin dashboard testids: stats-today-revenue etc not verified — selectors used generic content. Checkout testids are reliable: checkout-name, checkout-phone, checkout-pickup-time, checkout-place-order, order-confirmation, order-code.
rca_of_the_issue: No critical bugs. Only design-level issue is external CDN CORS for Brioche font — resolvable by re-hosting the font under frontend/public/fonts. No impact on functionality.
